steps.title: Follow the interpretive pivot
steps.content: The passage says a gender-focused reading of Instant Mural is understandable but incomplete because it does not explain Sandoval's presence. The phrase "We should instead consider" redirects the interpretation toward a different context: the art establishment's restriction of recognized Chicano art to sociohistorical muralism.

steps.title: Account for both artists
steps.content: That broader context explains why both Valdez and Sandoval are taped to a wall in a work called Instant Mural. The constraint is not only social expectations placed on women; it is also the aesthetic expectation that Chicano artists had to fit the muralist category to receive recognition.

steps.title: Avoid narrower readings
steps.content: Choice A splits Valdez and Sandoval into separate meanings. Choice B keeps female Chicano artists as the main subject. Choice C changes the target to muralists' depictions of Chicano culture, which the passage does not criticize. The answer is D.
